violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wiping clothes found not submerged in sanitizer solution on the bar and in the prep area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - Cutting boards and poly prep boards have deep knife scoring.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. - Cabinet handles and cabinet faces require more frequent cleaning. - Vent hood has droplets of grease that should be wiped down.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. - Wet cloths sitting on cutting board in kitchen and on prep table in wash room. Cloths need to be stored in sanitation buckets between uses.
